patterns.message: Cross-package relative-path imports from webview-ui/src/ are forbidden. They bypass the `exports` gate declared in webview-ui/package.json (Node only enforces exports for by-name imports, not relative paths). Use the by-name workspace import 'bmad-canvas-webview/<subpath>' instead (see the `exports` field in webview-ui/package.json for allowed subpaths).
